channel.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Aug 23rd - Aug 29th, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Books

  • Clojure, The Essential Reference – A reference book on the Clojure language and standard library.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

React.js Interface

  • Helixstars434 – A simple, easy to use library for React development in ClojureScript with very few semantics on top of React.
  • hxstars244 – Another simple, easy to use library for React development in ClojureScript.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Sep 23rd - Sep 29th, 2019
item.description:
Resources

Books

  • ClojureScript Unraveled – An open source book about the ClojureScript language that covers all the language features, how to use the compiler and the tooling for building applications and libraries.
  • ClojureScript: Up and Running – An introduction to ClojureScript written by big guns of Clojure Stuart Sierra and Luke VanderHart.
  • Etudes for ClojureScript – A hands-on-book of 30 companion exercises or études for introducing ClojureScript.
  • Learning ClojureScript – Master the art of agile single page web application development with ClojureScript.
  • Transforming Data with ClojureScript – A beginner's guide to ClojureScript with interactive examples and exercises, "focusing on the main task that programming does—transforming data".

    • Resources

    Courses

  • ClojureScript Koans – A great way to start learning Clojure and ClojureScript on the web with interactive challanges.
  • Lambda Island – A full-stack web development course including front-end with ClojureScript, back-end with Clojure, language essentials, security, internet standards and system administration.
  • Learn Reagent – An introduction to ClojureScript with Reagent for developers. 1 hour free content is available. learn re-frame is its follow up.
  • Learning ClojureScript – A 2h 11m long introduction to Clojurescript by O'Really Online Learning. Also available on Udemy.

    • Resources

    Videos

  • ClojureScript for Skeptics – Derek Slager's talk for Clojure Conj 2015 where he is Discussing the many reasons why ClojureScript is in fact a very pragmatic language to consider for web development.
  • Interactive programming Flappy Bird in ClojureScript – A 5 minutes video from 2014 demostrating the power of ClojureScript's developer experience.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Code Analysis

  • kibitstars1.7k – Static code analyzer to find patterns of code that could be rewritten with a more idiomatic function or macro.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Development

  • Amblystars537 – A ClojureScript REPL into iOS JavaScriptCore.
  • lein-cljsbuildstars1.1k – A Leiningen plugin to make ClojureScript development easy.
  • shadow-cljsstars2k – ClojureScript compilation made easy
  • Instaparsestars89 – It aims to be the simplest way to build parsers in ClojureScript.
  • Trussstars266 – An opinionated assertions API for Clojure/ClojureScript.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Internationalization

  • Tempurastars238 – A Clojure(Script) i18n library, succeeding Tower

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    React.js Interface

  • Omstars6.7k – A powerful interface to React, makes use of its object oriented structures.
  • Quiescentstars609 – It favors functional style, fully stateless.
  • Reagent – Minimalistic, feature complete.
  • Rumstars1.7k – Decomplected, extensible, simple.
  • cljsxstars9 – JSX for Clojure and ClojureScript, also works with Inferno, Nerv, Preact, Snabbdomestars10.6k and others.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Reactive Programming

  • Manifold-cljsstars45 – A port of Manifoldstars930 to ClojureScript.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Web Framework & Template

  • Fulcro – A library for development of single-page full-stack web applications in clj/cljs.
  • Mr-Clean – A reagent compatible library without react.js dependency.
  • Preceptstars644 – A declarative programming framework.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Document Object Model

  • Respostars235 – A responsive DOM library, inspired by React.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Apr 8th - Apr 14th, 2019
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Graphics

  • Quilstars2.8k – A processing and graphics programming library.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Dec 24th - Dec 30th, 2018
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Validation

  • form-validator-cljsstars53 – Validate forms with spec and fn.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Sep 17th - Sep 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Testing

  • cljs.test – Integrated test framework for ClojureScript (merged from clojurescript.teststars166)

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Aug 20th - Aug 26th, 2018
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Database

  • specqlstars125 – Library for simple PostgreSQL queries with namespaced keys.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    State Management

  • Tuckstars28 – A micro framework for building Reagent apps that have a clean separation of view code and event processing code.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Miscellaneous

  • namespacefystars19 – A simple Clojure(Script) library which aims to make it easy to keep map keys namespaced, no matter where your data comes from.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    CSS tools

  • Gardenstars1.3k – A library for rendering CSS in Clojure and ClojureScript.
  • stylefystars308 – stylefy makes it possible to define UI component styles as Clojure data and attach them into components easily without writing CSS selectors

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Jun 4th - Jun 10th, 2018
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Client/Server Communication

  • cljs-ajaxstars642 – A simple Ajax client for ClojureScript and Clojure.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Jun 12th - Jun 18th, 2017
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Development

  • Lumostars1.9k – Fast, cross-platform, standalone ClojureScript environment.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript May 29th - Jun 4th, 2017
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Web Framework & Template

  • Keechma – Micro frontend framework for ClojureScript and Reagent.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Mar 20th - Mar 26th, 2017
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Data Serialization

  • Cljsonstars63 – Clojure/ClojureScript library for accelerated browser data deserialization.
  • Transitstars316 – A data interchange format and set of libraries for conveying values between applications written in different programming languages.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Database

  • Konservestars284 – A clojuresque key-value/document store protocol with core.async.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Development

  • lein-figwheelstars2.9k – Leiningen plugin that pushes ClojureScript code changes to the client.
  • cljs-devtoolsstars1k – Better presentation of ClojureScript values in Chrome Devtools.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Document Object Model

  • Cratestars216 – A ClojureScript implementation of Hiccup.
  • Dommystars757 – A no-nonsense ClojureScript templating and DOM manipulation library.
  • Sablonostars681 – Lisp/Hiccup style templating for Facebook's React in ClojureScript.
  • Kioostars404 – DOM manipulation and templating library for Facebook's React and Om in ClojureScript.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Graphics

  • geomstars863 – A 2D/3D geometry toolkit for Clojure/Clojurescript.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Miscellaneous

  • markdown-cljstars514 – Markdown parser in Clojure/ClojureScript.
  • reformsstars169 – Beautiful Bootstrap 3 forms for Om and Reagent.
  • Keybindstars85 – Library for handling key bindings (shortcuts) in browser.
  • Sepal.cljstars28 – A library to generate Clojure code from a vector of strings and vectors with macro system.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    React.js Interface

  • re-comstars753 – A ClojureScript library of reusable components for Reagent.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    State Management

  • platostars29 – Incrementally persists atom state to Local Storage in ClojureScript.
  • storage-atomstars186 – ClojureScript atoms backed by HTML5 web storage.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Web Framework & Template

  • Chestnutstars1.3k – An Application template for ClojureScript/Om with live reloading.
  • WebFUIstars235 – Client-Side Web Framework for ClojureScript.
  • descjopstars393 – A template for Web based desktop application with Electron.
  • electron-templatestars112 – A template for creating web based desktop applications with Electron, ClojureScript and Reagent.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Canvas

  • Quamolitstars2 – A tiny declarative animation library , inspired by React.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Mar 6th - Mar 12th, 2017
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

WebSockets

  • Chordstars435 – Designed to bridge the gap between the triad of CLJ/CLJS, web-sockets and core.async.
  • Sentestars1.7k – Clojure(Script) + core.async + WebSockets/Ajax.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Development

  • Planckstars1k – A stand-alone ClojureScript REPL for macOS and Linux based on JavaScriptCore.
  • Ribol – Conditional restarts for clojure/clojurescript.
  • Devcardsstars1.5k – Devcards aims to provide a visual REPL experience for ClojureScript.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Feb 27th - Mar 5th, 2017
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Routing

  • Routerstars78 – Bidirectional Ring router for Clojure/Script. REST oriented.
  • Secretarystars768 – A client-side router for ClojureScript.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Feb 13th - Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Documentation

  • codoxstars637 – A tool for generating API documentation from Clojure or ClojureScript source code.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

State Management

  • componentstars2k – Managed lifecycle of stateful objects in Clojure(Script).
  • mountstars1.1k – A beautifl idiomatic state management library.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Jan 9th - Jan 15th, 2017
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Web Framework & Template

  • Macchiatostars374 – It aims to provide an easy to use platform for Node.js.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Dec 26th - Jan 1st, 2016
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

JavaScript Interoperability

  • Purnam – A ClojureScript library designed to provide better clojurescript/javascript interop, testing and documentation tools.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Jul 11th - Jul 17th, 2016
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Client/Server Communication

  • Fetchstars206 – A ClojureScript library that makes client/server interaction painless.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2016
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Miscellaneous

  • reagent-formsstars337 – Bootstrap form components for Reagent.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Miscellaneous

  • om-toolsstars438 – It aims to provide higher-order abstractions and utilities frequently useful when building components with Om's API.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2016
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Web Framework & Template

  • Clopsstars173 – An opinionated, full stack and easy to use web framework.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2015
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Document Object Model

  • Dominatorstars73 – Virtual-Dom in ClojureScript.
  • Enfocus – A DOM manipulation and templating library for ClojureScript inspired by Enlive.
  • Freactivestars393 – A high-performance, pure Clojurescript, declarative DOM library inspired by reagent, om, reflex and hiccup.
  • json-htmlstars158 – Provide JSON and get a DOM node with a human representation of that JSON.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2015
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

HTTP Handler

  • Castrastars167 – An HTTP remote procedure call handler for Clojure.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Reactive Programming

  • Javelinstars757 – A Functional Reactive Programming library for ClojureScript.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    State Management

  • hodgepodge – A idiomatic ClojureScript interface to HTML5 Storage.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2015
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Routing

  • Bidistars968 – A Clojure(script) data driven routing library.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Miscellaneous

  • Bardostars92 – A Clojure(Script) library for functional interpolation and transitions.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Testing

  • test.checkstars1.1k – A generative property-based testing tool inspired by QuickCheck.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Web Framework & Template

  • Tenzing – A ClojureScript template with no backend that uses Boot.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript May 25th - May 31st, 2015
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Reactive Programming

  • Reagistars224 – An FRP library for Clojure and ClojureScript, built on top of core.async.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    React.js Interface

  • Bruthastars138 – A simple and functional ClojureScript interface to React.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Miscellaneous

  • Entanglementstars42 – It creates atoms from other atoms and links the data together.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript May 18th - May 24th, 2015
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Reactive Programming

  • rx-cljsstars44 – A ClojureScript wrapper for Reactive Extensions (Rx) for Javascript.
  • Yolk – A thin ClojureScript wrapper around bacon.js.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    JavaScript Interoperability

  • Jayqstars409 – A ClojureScript wrapper for jQuery.
  • CLJSJS – An easy way for Clojurescript developers to depend on Javascript libraries.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Web Framework & Template

  • Miesstars369 – A minimal ClojureScript project template.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Miscellaneous

  • core.asyncstars1.9k – A Clojure(Script) library designed to provide facilities for async programming and communication.
  • Automatstars579 – A Clojure(Script) library for defining and using finite-state automata, inspired by Ragel.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript May 11th - May 17th, 2015
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Validation

  • Validateur – A Clojure validation library inspired by Ruby's ActiveModel.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript May 4th - May 10th, 2015
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Testing

  • Specljstars420 – A TDD/BDD framework for Clojure and ClojureScript.

item.title: hantuzun/awesome-clojurescript Apr 27th - May 3rd, 2015
item.description:
Awesome ClojureScript

Web Framework & Template

  • atw-omstars40 – A web application template with Clojure/Compojure, ClojureScript/Om & core.async.
  • Hoplon – Write everything in Clojure and ClojureScript, clientside and serverside.
  • Luminus – It aims to provide a robust, scalable, and easy to use platform.
  • re-framestars5.2k – A Reagent Framework For Writing SPAs, in Clojurescript.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Internationalization

  • Towerstars271 – A Clojure(Script) i18n & L10n library.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Validation

  • Bouncerstars358 – A validation DSL for Clojure & Clojurescript applications.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Document Object Model

  • Hickorystars537 – It parses HTML into Clojure data structures, so you can analyze, transform, and output back to HTML.
  • cljs-bindingstars57 – It binds html elements to ClojureScript functions.
  • Hiccupsstars197 – A ClojureScript port of the Hiccup.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    State Management

  • Waltzstars91 – A ClojureScript library that helps manage state in client-side applications using non-deterministic finite state machines.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Testing

  • Expectations – A minimalist's unit testing framework.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Routing

  • Silkstars219 – An isomorphic routing library for Clojure & ClojureScript.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Canvas

  • Monetstars165 – A small ClojureScript library to make it easier to work with canvas and visuals.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Data Visualization

  • C2 – It lets you declaratively create HTML and SVG markup based on data.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Miscellaneous

  • inflections-cljstars202 – Rails-like inflection library for Clojure and ClojureScript.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    Database

  • Datascriptstars4.9k – An immutable in-memory database and Datalog query engine in ClojureScript.
  • Jakistars16 – A simple ClojureScript CouchDB client.

    • Awesome ClojureScript

    JavaScript Interoperability

  • Pylonstars48 – A Javascript class system in 100% Clojurescript.
